# Shreyansh Mathur

> Strategy Associate at PwC India. CS engineer who builds what he designs. Specialises in GCC operating model design, AI transformation, and enterprise tool development. Based in Mumbai, India.

Shreyansh Mathur is a management consultant and software engineer currently working as an Associate in the Strategy practice at PwC India. He holds a B.Tech in Computer Science from VIT Vellore (2025) and has worked across PwC, EY, and his own consultancy BelleVidCo, delivering strategy engagements and AI-powered tools for enterprise clients across FMCG, cement, chemicals, logistics, fashion, healthcare, and PE advisory.

## Contact

- Email: shreyanshmathur12@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shreyanshmathur
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur
- Portfolio: https://shreyanshportfolioconsultant.netlify.app

## Current Role

**Associate, Strategy — PwC India** (Aug 2025 – Present)

- Five-year India Tech Hub strategy for a global FMCG client: scaled operating model from 27 → 108 FTEs across 4 geographies; C-suite alignment across India, Singapore, and Dubai
- National AI Accelerator co-lead: 12 enterprise AI tools shipped; +15% adoption in 90 days; zero governance incidents
- IT operating model redesign for a national cement leader across 15+ states: 25% faster incident dispatch; unified reporting
- Tools: Power BI, Python, SAP FICO/MM, Excel VBA, Miro, Jira

## Work Experience

**PwC India — Advisory Intern** (Jan – Aug 2025)
- SAP FICO/MM optimisation for a major paint manufacturer: 500+ users trained; adoption target hit in 30 days post-go-live
- Real-time programme tracker (Power BI) for 15+ concurrent initiatives; zero delivery slippage
- Lean Six Sigma process mapping + VBA/Python automation: 20% cycle time reduction

**EY — GCC Research Intern** (Aug – Dec 2023)
- Built and deployed an AI sales pipeline across 4 city offices (Bengaluru, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Delhi): 75% reduction in manual prospecting hours
- Tableau and Power BI dashboards for acquisition KPIs used by BD leadership weekly
- GCC benchmarking research cited in Fortune 500 client strategy decks

**BelleVidCo / MSC Consultancy — Co-founder and CEO** (Feb 2023 – Dec 2024)
- 12 client engagements across 8 sectors: logistics, PE advisory, healthcare, retail AI, events, fashion, fintech, construction
- 5× ROI on automation builds; 15+ clients served; 5-person specialist team
- Key clients: Robinsons Global Logistics (AI warehouse ops, ~35% pick travel cut), Bombay Closet Cleanse (AI pricing engine, 3,500 garments/month), SPACES by Welspun (5 AI features across full shopping journey), Surya Hospitals (AI coordination layer, human-first governance), Milestone Search Capital (PE deal infrastructure, 50+ intermediaries activated)

**Social Eyes — Business Development Intern** (Jun – Aug 2023)
- 20% lift in lead conversion rate through targeted sales strategy implementation
- 10% market penetration increase via customer behaviour analysis in hospitality and fashion verticals

**Webminix — Business Development Intern** (Mar – Apr 2022)
- 20% monthly revenue increase through new sales opportunities
- 15% client acquisition boost via gym partnership channel
- Managed and cleaned a 5,000+ contact marketing database; improved accuracy by 20%

**Recover Media — Marketing Team Lead** (Aug 2020 – Jan 2023)
- Grew subscriber base by 8,000+ in six months; promoted to team lead within 6 months
- Multi-platform campaign frameworks lifted brand awareness by 20%

## Campus Leadership

**graVITas, VIT Vellore — Head of Corporate Relations** (Aug – Sep 2024)
- India's largest student-run tech fest with 100,000+ participants
- Led a 35-person corporate relations team
- Secured ₹75 lakh+ in sponsorship (40% increase year-on-year)
- Partners: Altium, Autodesk, Nestlé, EaseMyTrip
- 100% sponsor satisfaction; 80% interested in future partnerships

**Riviera, VIT University — Head of Corporate Relations** (Jan – Mar 2024)
- South India's largest cultural festival; 500+ colleges participating
- Closed ₹1.25 crore+ in sponsorship
- Secured Pepsi as title sponsor and 20+ additional national brand partners
- 90% sponsor retention rate; redesigned coordination processes for 35% faster turnaround

**Dream Merchants, VIT — Core Team, Financial Mentor** (Mar 2022 – Jan 2025)
- VIT's premier entrepreneurship club
- Mentored 100+ student entrepreneurs on financial planning, valuation, and fundraising strategy
- Delivered 25+ workshops and events reaching 500+ participants; 1,000+ students reached through outreach
- Built 15+ industry partnerships from scratch; grew club funding by 40%

## Projects

**01. Enterprise Capability Generator**
- Type: Consulting Tool | Client: Internal PwC engagements
- Stack: React 18, SheetJS, PptxGenJS, Recharts
- Impact: Eliminates 4–6 hours of manual work per engagement
- Summary: Browser tool that ingests capability scoring across 8 business domains (XLSX) and exports fully formatted, branded PowerPoint decks in one click

**02. AI Pharmacy Demand Forecasting Bot**
- Type: Healthcare AI | Client: Pharmacy chain
- Stack: Python, pandas, Prophet, statsmodels, FastAPI, React
- Impact: 60-day forecast horizon; ~85% accuracy on test set
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/surya-pharmacy-os

**03. Surya Hospital AI Coordination Layer**
- Type: Healthcare Automation | Client: Surya Hospital
- Stack: React, FastAPI, Groq (Llama), python-telegram-bot, PostgreSQL, WhatsApp Business API
- Impact: 60-second doctor pre-brief with full patient history; 6 AI capabilities deployed; zero auto-sent communications
- Summary: Call intelligence, drop-off detection, patient records intelligence, WhatsApp community pipeline. AI proposes, human reviews, human sends.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/SuryaPOC2

**04. SPACES AI Shopping Experience**
- Type: Retail AI | Client: SPACES by Welspun (premium home textiles D2C)
- Stack: JavaScript, FastAPI, Groq (Llama 3), React, Cloudinary
- Impact: 5 AI features deployed across full customer journey from discovery to post-purchase
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/spaces-style-concierge

**05. Learner Risk Copilot**
- Type: EdTech AI | Client: EdTech platform
- Stack: React, Groq AI, Netlify, Chart.js, Tailwind CSS
- Impact: Live in production; 78% precision on historical refund data in backtesting
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/learner-risk-copilot
- Live: https://learner-risk-copilot.netlify.app

**06. Bombay Closet Cleanse AI Pricing Engine**
- Type: Retail AI | Client: Bombay Closet Cleanse (pre-loved fashion)
- Stack: Groq Vision (LLaVA), FastAPI, HTML/CSS/JS, Netlify, Shopify API, WhatsApp Business API
- Impact: ~5 seconds per item (from 4 minutes manual); 3,500+ units/month; zero manual pricing required
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/bcc-pricing-poc

**07. Baring Private Equity India Site**
- Type: Corporate Website | Client: Baring Private Equity Partners India
- Stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Netlify
- Impact: Live in production; sub-1s load time
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/baring-private-equity

**08. Robinsons Global Logistics AI Ops**
- Type: Ops Automation | Client: Robinsons Global Logistics (3PL warehousing, Bhiwandi)
- Stack: Python, scikit-learn, FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL
- Impact: ~35% pick travel reduced; 60%+ data visibility gained; deployed in 4 weeks

**09. Milestone Search Capital**
- Type: Corporate Website | Client: Milestone Search Capital (India-focused search fund)
- Stack: React, Notion CRM, Webflow, Airtable, Zapier
- Impact: 50+ intermediaries activated; 50%+ research time saved; 8-week full build

**10. Jakota Brand and AI Command Board**
- Type: Corporate Website + Internal Tool | Client: Jakota (engineered formwork and scaffolds)
- Stack: React, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Recharts, Webflow
- Impact: 1 unified command board; zero data silos; full digital presence rebuilt

## Core Skills

**Strategy & Consulting:** GCC operating model design, market entry strategy, AI transformation, IT operating model redesign, process improvement (Lean Six Sigma), programme management, C-suite stakeholder management, KPI design and benchmarking

**Engineering:** React 18, Python, FastAPI, Node.js, HTML/CSS/JavaScript, TypeScript

**AI & ML:** Groq (Llama, LLaVA), Prophet, scikit-learn, ARIMA/SARIMA, LLM integrations, prompt engineering

**Data & Analytics:** Power BI, Tableau, pandas, PostgreSQL, Excel VBA, SQL

**Enterprise Systems:** SAP FICO/MM (advanced user)

**Deployment:** Netlify, Vite, GitHub Actions, Vercel
